message:
fuzz(resolv): add LOC RR codec round-trip + diff target [bd-58e87f]

Two-mode fuzz target for the freshly-implemented RFC 1876 LOC codec:

  Mode 0 (binary→ntoa→aton round-trip):
    Random 16-byte input clamped to physically valid lat/lon/alt
    ranges and 0..=9 mantissa nibbles; assert lat/lon/alt bytes
    match after fl-to-fl round-trip.

  Mode 1 (text→aton→ntoa diff vs libresolv):
    Arbitrary printable text; assert acceptance, binary bytes,
    and ntoa output all agree with host libresolv.

Type-checks cleanly under +nightly. The asprintf/argz fuzz targets
established the dual binary/text-fuzz pattern; this extends it to
the new LOC codec to widen coverage beyond the 12 hand-crafted
conformance cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
